message:
fix(tests): update test struct instantiations for refactored types

- e2e_action_tray.rs: Remove obsolete comm/cmd fields from PlanAction
- safety_gates.rs: Add missing fields to DecisionRationale (posterior,
  memory_mb, has_known_signature, category) and dro field to
  DecisionOutcome. Remove duplicate ProcStat tests (now in session.rs)
- action_real.rs, cgroup_throttle_real.rs: Add missing fields to
  ActionRationale helper functions

These changes fix compilation errors caused by struct field changes
in the plan and decision modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -220,8 +220,6 @@ fn make_pause_action(pid: u32, pgid: Option<u32>, action_id: &str) -> PlanAction
         confidence: ActionConfidence::Normal,
         original_zombie_target: None,
         d_state_diagnostics: None,
-        comm: None,
-        cmd: None,
     }
 }
 
@@ -249,8 +247,6 @@ fn make_resume_action(pid: u32, pgid: Option<u32>, action_id: &str) -> PlanActio
         confidence: ActionConfidence::Normal,
         original_zombie_target: None,
         d_state_diagnostics: None,
-        comm: None,
-        cmd: None,
     }
 }
 
@@ -282,8 +278,6 @@ fn make_kill_action(pid: u32, action_id: &str, pre_checks: Vec<PreCheck>) -> Pla
         confidence: ActionConfidence::Normal,
         original_zombie_target: None,
         d_state_diagnostics: None,
-        comm: None,

 }
